observations.description: Latest commit 6b4c544 changed MAX_SESSIONS from static const to enum in FibEngine.mqh. Non-functional — arrays still sized 2048, enum constant used identically at line 242 bounds check.
is_equity_index_symbol() uses strpos('NAS100') || strpos('US30') — consistent with input: symbols are always pre-normalized uppercase before this call. No false-positive risk identified.

multi-candle batch (candles[] with >1 entry) logs a diagnostic and stores only candles[0]. Comment correctly states this is Phase 3 scope. Phase 3 is now complete, but multi-candle batch ingestion was not part of Phase 3 scope — it is deferred. No functional gap for current EA pattern.

vite and @eslint/js packages not installed in remote execution environment. Pre-existing limitation confirmed across all prior workflow runs (2026-05-11 through 2026-05-25). TypeScript type safety is enforced at the source level; builds confirmed passing in local/CI environments.

migration_blockers.description: Live MT5 corpus not yet captured — parity validator cannot run
migration_blockers.action: Operator must deploy Phase-4-Implementation branch to live MT5 terminal, wait for FibEngine to accumulate 30-day corpus, capture Pine reference snapshots, then run: php scripts/parity-validator.php --mt5-file mt5-levels.json --pine-file pine-levels.json --out reports/phase4-gate.json

migration_blockers.description: T0 admin baseline not yet created in soak workspace
migration_blockers.action: Open /admin → Soak Workspace → create PHASE_4_IMPLEMENTATION_START baseline. This also clears Phase 3 CONDITIONAL PASS blocker RISK-06.

migration_blockers.description: Pine reference snapshots not yet captured from TradingView
migration_blockers.action: Export fib levels for EURUSD, USDJPY, XAUUSD from TradingView at a known UTC timestamp → save as pine-levels.json

payload_validation_audit.quote_time_check: parsed, stale rejection at 300s → HTTP 422, unparseable → HTTP 422
payload_validation_audit.tick_volume_check: clamped to 0 if negative or non-numeric
payload_validation_audit.multi_candle_shim: candles[0] promoted as candle when candle absent
